title: elymus alienus
intro: Elymus alienus, also known as wild ryegrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Elymus alienus include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Elymus alienus is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
